# BingeTrack

BingeTrack is a free movie watchlist web application at https://bingetrack.vercel.app

## What BingeTrack does
- Search any movie from the OMDb database (500,000+ titles)
- Create named watchlist folders to organize films
- Add movies to multiple watchlists
- Share public watchlists via a URL
- View IMDB ratings and movie details within the app

## User flows
- Anonymous: search movies, view ratings and details, view any public watchlist
- Signed in: create watchlists, add/remove movies, toggle lists public or private

## Key pages
- / — Homepage with movie search and popular movies
- /movie/[imdbID] — Movie detail: IMDB rating, plot, cast, director, "Add to Watchlist"
- /watchlists/[id] — A named watchlist showing a poster grid of saved movies
- /u/[username] — A user's public profile showing all their public watchlists

## Data source
Movie data and ratings are provided by the OMDb API (omdbapi.com).
Ratings shown are IMDB community ratings on a 1–10 scale.

## Tech stack
Next.js 14 (App Router), Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth), OMDb API, Vercel, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

## Free to use
No subscription required. Sign up with email to create and share watchlists.
